title: Can Interoception Improve the Pragmatic Search for Biomarkers in Psychiatry?

assets.abstract: Disrupted interoception is a prominent feature of the diagnostic classification of several psychiatric disorders. However, progress in understanding the interoceptive basis of these disorders has been incremental, and the application of interoception in clinical treatment is currently limited to panic disorder. To examine the degree to which the scientific community has recognized interoception as a construct of interest, we identified and individually screened all articles published in the Engl

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.
